[第2页]
QuickSpecs
HPE Cray Rack Options
Overview

Page 2
Liquid Cooling (DLC) to increase the percentage of heat capture to water, meeting room-neutral requirements.

RDHX with 42U or 48U Rack Options

[第3页]
QuickSpecs
HPE Cray Rack Options
Standard Features

Page 3
Key Features
General Solution
−
Liquid to air heat exchanger cooling system attached to back of a standard IT rack
−
Hot air exhaust from the server moves through cooling coils to remove the heat
Cooling Capacity (kW per rack)*
−
M12: 14-35kW
−
M14: 35-55kW
Notes: *See RDHX Site Planning Guide for additional information and specifications
Water
−
Accommodates facility water temperatures 2° C (4F) above maximum anticipated dew point
−
Accommodates water pressure between 25 and 100 psi (172 – 689 kpa)
−
Power
−
Input power support for 208V / 230V / 277V (1-phase)
Flexibility
−
HPE 42U or 48U racks for IT equipment are supporting shipping of fully integrated rack solutions (HPE Factory
Express or Partner rack integration) as these are delivered on shock pallet
−
Underfloor and overhead plumbing capabilities
−
Full services offering available, including planning, deployment and maintenance
Agency Certifications
−
ETL, CSA, CE Certified

[第4页]
QuickSpecs
HPE Rear Door Heat Exchanger
Configuration Information

Page 4
Each RDHX SKU includes
−
One external 2-way control valve & actuator assembly
−
One external flow meter
−
All cabling to connect external controls to door

Notes: Need 1 Hose Kit SKU and 1 Facility Adapter SKU per door that is on order.

270kW CDU for RDHX - USA Voltage

HPE Cray Supercomputer 3-phase 270kW 208V 60Hz 63.5mm NA Floor Coolant Distribution Unit
R4N53A

270kW CDU for RDHX - EU Voltage CDU for RDHX

R9B19A

USA Facility Adapter RDHX CDU

HPE Cray Supercomputing 76.2mm H2O Adapter NPT Assembly
R6T83A

International Facility Adapter for RDHX CDU (Only International Sites That Require
BSPT Thread)

HPE Cray Supercomputer 76.2mm Water Adapter BSPT Assembly
S0B12A
Notes:
–
Need 1 Facility Adapter SKU (R6T83A or S0B12A) per CDU on order.
–
A CDU is required for sites that have supply water temperature at or below dew point.
–
–
manifold that feeds from the CDU to the RDHX’s.
–
Consult with Site Engineering when planning to use or don’t know if you will need to use a
CDU.
